label: 1520 CE
era_summary: Year 1520 (MDXX) was a leap year starting on Sunday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Brecke records no major conflicts touching this region in 1520 (safety scored at the era baseline of 85). No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1520: Turkey (Corsairs)-Spain, Hafsids (Algiers, Djidjelli, Tlemcen), 1514-21; Spain (Barcelona), 1519-22; Spain-Aztecs (Mexico), 1519-21. Maddison records GDP/capita 1381 (ESP, 1520) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
